heroSubText: Full-stack developer building modern web applications with React, Next.js, and thoughtful design
aboutP1: I'm a passionate developer focused on creating beautiful, functional web experiences. With expertise in modern frontend frameworks and backend technologies, I bridge the gap between design and engineering.
aboutP2: My journey started with a curiosity about how things work. Over the years, I've learned that great software is about understanding user needs and writing clean, maintainable code.
skillsSubText: Specialized expertise in modern web technologies and development practices
projectsSubText: A showcase of recent work demonstrating design thinking and technical execution
contactSubText: I'm always interested in hearing about new opportunities and collaborations. Feel free to reach out through any of these channels.
